milestones.title: Let Me Beginner
milestones.description: Successfully formed 10 'Let me' sentences using the correct formula.

milestones.title: Permission Master
milestones.description: Correctly used Let him/her/them/us in 20 sentences across daily, office, and formal contexts.

milestones.title: Negative Champion
milestones.description: Mastered 'Don't let' sentences — no more 'Let not' mistakes!

milestones.title: Let Pro — Practice Complete
milestones.description: Completed all 100 practice questions on Use of Let.

milestones.title: Day 13 Star
milestones.description: Completed all exercises — lessons, vocab, test, speaking, writing, reading, and listening — for Day 13.
